privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated inventory data within an Odoo environment, populated via `setup_task.sh`. By examining the setup and verifier scripts, it was confirmed that the master product codes (JAN-001, JAN-002, JAN-003), duplicate product codes, unrelated product codes, and mapping pairs explicitly match the task's instructions. Furthermore, the combined expected stock quantities exactly match the mathematical sum of the initial quantities injected by the setup script: 25 for JAN-001, 15 for JAN-002, and 32 for JAN-003.
